calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-29-2023 Off Calendar

Motion And Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-16-2023 Continued To Jun-28-23 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 505

Motion And Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-28-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Gail Dekreon; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:30:38 p.m. and concluding at 2:40:23 p.m.

Plaintiff FC Marketplace LLC. appearing represented by Ronnie Chow, Esq.
Defendant Ani Hunanyan not appearing.

ERBERT ECKART is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff FC Marketplace LLC, and against Defendant Ani Hunanyan, as follows:

1. Damages: $52,475.38
2. Prejudgment Interest: $19,039.12
3. Costs: $656.50
4. Attorney's Fees: $800.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $72,971.00

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)
